note: Idle economy for Voxelheim, GROUNDED in references/idle_deconstruction.md (Clicker Heroes ~x1.55/encounter HP, boss x10; Tap Titans 2 1.57^stage; prestige from accumulated progress with a fractional scale + flat %/unit per Hero Souls; Pecorella: reset at +50-200%). v3 (2026-06-16, lead decision): MULTIPLICATIVE damage. Hero damage = hero_base_damage * (sword damage_mult_per_level)^sword_level * prestige global-damage mult, so power COMPOUNDS and tracks the exponential HP climb (the core idle dopamine, as Clicker Heroes / Tap Titans 2). Flat +3 dmg/level could not track HP x1.45/stage and forced a relative-timer band-aid; removed. Sword x1.12/level => ~3.3 sword levels recover one stage's HP x1.45 step, matching 'damage tracks HP'. Boss timer back to a FIXED 30s (with compounding damage the stage-10/20/30 bosses are beaten in <7s). v4 (2026-06-17, depth pass toward Clicker Heroes / Tap Titans 2): added (1) an ACTIVE ABILITY 'Frost Fury' (a tappable damage burst on a cooldown -- the moment-to-moment action the refs reward but never require; idle still progresses fully), (2) THREE more upgrades (Crit, Greed, Multi-strike) that touch damage/gold MULTIPLICATIVELY for more 'what next' decisions, and (3) a PRESTIGE TREE: the 4 flat shard upgrades become 7 nodes with light GATING (some unlock after an earlier node or a prestige count) so investing shards is a real decision (CH Ancients / TT2 artifacts).

monster.scaling_note: per-stage step (10 same-HP kills/stage); steepened from 1.15 toward the refs' ~1.55/encounter so the climb reads as idle number-go-up. gold grows just under HP so upgrades stay meaningful.

boss.timer_note: FIXED 30s timer (lead decision, v3 2026-06-16). The relative-timer band-aid is REMOVED: it was only needed because flat-additive Sword (+3/level) could not track HP x1.45/stage. With MULTIPLICATIVE damage (Sword x1.12/level + prestige x-damage), the hero's DPS compounds alongside monster HP, so a base run beats the stage-10 boss in ~6s, stage-20 in <1s, stage-30 in <1s -- all comfortably inside 30s. Headless sim (tools): base run reaches stage 30 (past prestige@25). 30s sits in the 20-40s design band.

sword.label: Sword
sword.sword_note: MULTIPLICATIVE (v3): hero damage = hero_base_damage * 1.12^sword_level * prestige global-damage mult. x1.12/level => 1.12^3.28 = x1.45, so ~3-4 sword levels recover one stage's HP x1.45 step, keeping damage tracking the climb (Clicker Heroes / Tap Titans 2 scale damage multiplicatively). Was flat damage_per_level: 3, which could not track exponential HP.

crit.label: Crit
crit.crit_note: v4: +3% crit chance/level (capped 60%). A crit deals crit_damage_mult x the hit. Expected damage multiplier = 1 + chance*(crit_damage_mult-1), so DMG readout rises MULTIPLICATIVELY with crit chance (a CH/TT2 staple decision: invest in burst vs steady).

greed.label: Greed
greed.greed_note: v4: gold x1.08/level COMPOUNDING (multiplies all gold like Rich Veins but bought with run gold). Stacks multiplicatively with Luck + the shard gold mult, so a 'gold build' is a real alternative to a 'damage build'.

multi.label: Multi
multi.multi_note: v4: +2.5% chance/level (capped 75%) for a swing to strike TWICE. Expected damage multiplier = 1 + chance, so it raises the DMG readout MULTIPLICATIVELY -- a third damage lever alongside Sword (flat mult) and Crit (burst).

frost_fury.label: Frost Fury
frost_fury.ability_note: v4 ACTIVE LAYER (the biggest feel gain; Clicker Heroes click-damage / Tap Titans 2 skills): a tappable on-screen button (+ DevAPI game.debug.ability) that, when ready, grants +200% hero damage (x3.0) for 5s, then a 20s cooldown shown as a radial/bar fill. Idle STILL progresses fully without ever tapping it (never required); tapping just buys a power spike. Activation throws a juicy levelup_burst + hit_spark FX.

prestige.label: Return to the valley
prestige.formula_note: fractional exponent (was super-linear ^1.5, wrong direction) so each prestige grants ~+50-200% more shards (Pecorella); modeled on Clicker Heroes (souls from accumulated progress) not a super-linear stage power. At highest_stage 25 (first prestige) = 4 shards, enough to buy ~3 global_damage levels (x1.33 / +33% base damage) so the next run blasts the early stages and reaches the old wall clearly faster.

global_damage.label: Sharper Steel
global_damage.shard_note: MULTIPLICATIVE (v3): global damage mult = (1 + 10/100)^level = 1.10^level (+10%/level, COMPOUNDING, as Clicker Heroes Hero Souls). Multiplies hero_base_damage alongside the Sword mult.

ftue.beat1: Your hero fights on its own - watch the gold pile up.
ftue.beat2: Tap Sword to upgrade - hit harder, kill faster.
ftue.beat3: Push as far as you can. When it slows, Prestige for a permanent boost.
